scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:css && npm run check:v2-tokens
scripts.perf:lhci: npm run build:v2 && cd .. && npx --yes @lhci/cli@0.15.x autorun --config=lighthouserc.json
scripts.verify:platform-layout: npm exec -- tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run test:unit -- src/components/Layout/AppLayout.test.tsx src/pages/Login.page.test.tsx src/pages/Dashboard.page.test.tsx && npm run test:visual:platform && playwright test tests/e2e-node/platform-shell.spec.ts && npm run build
scripts.verify:platform-data-inventory: npm exec -- tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run test:unit -- src/pages/Datasources.page.test.tsx src/pages/Datasets.page.test.tsx && playwright test tests/e2e-node/platform-data-inventory.spec.ts && npm run build
scripts.verify:platform-query-workbench: npm exec -- tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run test:unit -- src/pages/QueryCenter/Dashboard.page.test.tsx src/pages/QueryCenter/MyQueries.page.test.tsx src/pages/QueryCenter/History.page.test.tsx src/pages/QueryCenter/ScheduledQueries.page.test.tsx src/pages/QueryCenter/VisualBuilder.page.test.tsx src/pages/DataChat.page.test.tsx && playwright test tests/e2e-node/platform-query-analysis.spec.ts && npm run build
scripts.verify:semantic-layout: npm exec -- tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run test:unit -- src/pages/Semantic/CubeList.page.test.tsx src/pages/Semantic/DomainList.page.test.tsx src/pages/Semantic/OntologyWorkbench.page.test.tsx src/pages/Semantic/RelationCanvas.page.test.tsx src/pages/Semantic/DomainCanvas.page.test.tsx src/pages/Semantic/DevTools.page.test.tsx src/pages/Semantic/domainCanvasState.test.ts src/components/Semantic/workbench.test.tsx && npm run test:visual && playwright test tests/e2e-node/cube-browse.spec.ts tests/e2e-node/domain-creation.spec.ts tests/e2e-node/domain-catalog.spec.ts tests/e2e-node/domain-publish.spec.ts tests/e2e-node/devtools-browse.spec.ts tests/e2e-node/ontology-browse.spec.ts
scripts.verify:ui: npm exec -- tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:semantic: npm exec -- tsc --noEmit --pretty false && npm run build && node ./scripts/run-semantic-smoke.mjs tests/e2e/domain_creation_smoke.py tests/e2e/domain_publish_smoke.py tests/e2e/cube_draft_smoke.py
